full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Ensuring LLM disclosure files are correctly structured
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Do all my LLM disclosure JSONs have the required fields — task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification — and a top_5_prompts section? Check llm_task_1_1 through llm_task_3_2 and flag anything missing.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Identified that the Task 4.1 and Task 4.2 disclosure files were missing and verified the existing files had correct structure.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked each JSON file against the assignment's field requirements table on page 8.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: N/A — no code involved, only JSON structure validation.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Do all my LLM disclosure JSONs have the required fields — task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification — and a top_5_prompts section? Check llm_task_1_1 through llm_task_3_2 and flag anything missing.
top_5_prompts.why_selected: This was the primary interaction for Task 4.2 — validating disclosure completeness.

overall_reflection: Task 4.2 involved organizing and validating the LLM disclosure files across all tasks. The LLM helped verify structural completeness of the JSON files against assignment requirements.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that all LLM interactions across Part B have been documented in the respective disclosure files (llm_task_1_1.json through llm_task_4_2.json). Each file contains accurate records of how LLM tools were used for the corresponding task.
